Total Credits:

(Must be at least 122 credits or 123 credits if JOUR181 required)

Prior Learning Credits:

Questions:

Tips 1. Save a copy of this worksheet as "Your Name - Four-Year Plan" and email it to jouradvising@umd.edu when you finish!

2. Are you considering a double major/minor/certificate? Thinking about studying abroad? Do you want to graduate early? Do you have other questions? Let us know!

3. If you have AP/IB/transfer credits that you completed in high school, list them at the bottom and make sure to have your scores or transcripts sent to UMD's Registrar!

4. Start by listing your fall classes in Semester 1 — if you tested out of JOUR181 and dropped the class, you won't earn that credit.

5. List the total number of credits you plan to take each semester. Keep in mind that Testudo will only allow you to register for up to 16 credits without special permission from the College.

6. You can use Testudo's Schedule of Classes to come up with a plan for semester 2 and beyond, but you're also welcome to list placeholders like "DSHU" or "Concentration #3."

7. If you want to take a class or classes over the summer or winter, list them here. Summer/winter classes are not required!
